x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR case SLAs provide the urgency and priority signals Now Assist uses for AI-driven case prioritization and escalation recommendations. Missing SLAs mean Now Assist cannot differentiate case urgency.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure HR case SLAs for each case type and priority level. Target: 5+ active SLA definitions covering key HR service types. Now Assist HRSD uses SLA data for AI case prioritization recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c58
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[HR case SLAs provide the urgency and priority signals Now Assist uses for AI-driven case prioritization and escalation recommendations. Missing SLAs mean Now Assist cannot differentiate case urgency.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Case SLA Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sla');
    ga.addQuery('table', 'CONTAINS', 'sn_hr_core');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active HR SLA definitions';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active HR SLAs. Now Assist HRSD can use SLA breach risk for AI case prioritization.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active HR SLA(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist HRSD SLA-based AI prioritization will have limited differentiation across case types.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active HR SLAs defined. Now Assist HRSD cannot differentiate case urgency for AI prioritization without SLA definitions.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000402</number><order>100</order><remediation_guidance>Configure HR case SLAs for each case type and priority level. Target: 5+ active SLA definitions covering key HR service types. Now Assist HRSD uses SLA data for AI case prioritization recommendations.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c58</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Case SLA Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c58</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
